title: Contact Me - Dr. Jeevun Sandher MP
meta_description: Contact details for Dr. Jeevun Sandher MP. You can contact me by email, phone or letter.
text_excerpt: Contact Me - Dr. Jeevun Sandher MP Home News How I can help Newsletter Tours of Parliament Visits and Diary Contact Me Please remember to include your name and address if you write to me and would like a reply,. Parliamentary protocol prevents an MP dealing with enquiries from another MP’s constituency, so I will need to confirm you are within the Loughborough constituency. If you are not sure, you can Find Your MP on the Parliament website.. Please note that I do not have a office open to visitors , however I do hold in-person surgeries across the constituency. If you want to speak to me in person you can book a surgery appointment . Email jeevun.sandher.mp@parliament.uk Phone 01509 351051 Letter PO Box 11212 LOUGHBOROUGH LE11 9PU House of Commons LONDON SW1A 1AA Privacy policy If you contact me, I may need to store and use certain personal information for the purpose of responding to your query or providing help with an issue. For more details please see my Privacy Policy . Dr. Jeevun Sandher MP for Loughborough, Shepshed and the Villages Site content Home News How I can help Newsletter Tours of Parliament Visits and Diary Policies Privacy Policy Acceptable behaviour
